chicken breast.cooking_note: Loses ~25% weight during cooking due to water loss

mutton liver.cooking_note: Cooks fast, gets rubbery if overcooked

bombay duck.cooking_note: Extremely high water content, shrinks heavily

greek yogurt.cooking_note: Used as is or in cold dishes

ragi.cooking_note: Absorbs water for mudde or roti

eggplant.cooking_note: Acts like a sponge for oil, shrinks

olive oil.cooking_note: Used for dressing or light cooking

fat_loss.meal_timing_note: Spread protein evenly across 4-5 meals to preserve muscle

maintain.meal_timing_note: Consistent meal timing matters more than strict tracking

athletic_performance.meal_timing_note: High carb meal 2-3 hours pre-workout, protein + carb within 30 mins post

vegan_muscle_gain.meal_timing_note: Combine protein sources (e.g., rice and beans) and prioritize high-protein soy products

egg rice.serving_note: 150g white rice cooked + 2 whole eggs scrambled

paneer bhurji.serving_note: 100g paneer + 1 tsp oil + onion tomato base

chicken rice bowl.serving_note: 150g chicken breast cooked + 150g white rice cooked

1 plate.components: 2 roti + 1 katori dal + 1 katori sabzi + 50g rice
